news: AbbVie submitted FDA application for risankizumab subcutaneous induction in adults with moderately to severely active Crohn's disease, enabling fully subcutaneous treatment from induction through maintenance.

changes.reason: FDA submission already filed; no change to base case probability of success
Subcutaneous induction filing based on positive Phase 3 AFFIRM data; approval probability remains high
Fully subcutaneous treatment option improves convenience vs IV induction, potentially increasing penetration by 5%

news: Intellia will report topline clinical data from its global Phase 3 HAELO clinical trial of lonvoguran ziclumeran in hereditary angioedema today at 8:00 a.m. ET.

changes.reason: HAELO Phase 3 data readout today - increasing PoS slightly given stock surge suggests positive sentiment but being conservative until actual results
Similar modest increase for bull case given data readout catalyst today

news: Arcutis submitted supplemental NDA to FDA for ZORYVE cream expansion to treat atopic dermatitis in infants down to 3 months, supported by positive INTEGUMENT-INFANT Phase 2 data.

changes.reason: sNDA submission to FDA for infant AD indication increases probability of approval from Phase 2 data to regulatory filing stage
Even in bear case, sNDA filing with positive Phase 2 data warrants higher approval probability
Bull case benefits from de-risked regulatory pathway with actual sNDA submission

news: Intellia announces it will report topline data from HAELO Phase 3 trial on April 27, 2026, providing a specific date for the key lonvo-z readout.

changes.reason: Company provided specific date for HAELO topline data readout

news: Intellia announced positive Phase 3 HAELO results for lonvo-z in hereditary angioedema, meeting all endpoints, with rolling BLA submission initiated and launch planned for first half of 2027.

changes.reason: Phase 3 HAELO met primary and all key secondary endpoints with positive safety data
Rolling BLA submission initiated confirms regulatory pathway success probability increase
Even in bear case, positive Phase 3 data reduces failure risk
BLA submission already initiated de-risks regulatory approval
Strong Phase 3 data meeting all endpoints supports bull case penetration
Positive Phase 3 results make mega bear scenario less likely
